videoSnippet.title: How To Checkmate When You're Dead Lost
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Firouzja, Alireza (3323) - Gurel, Ediz (3313) 
Bullet Chess Championship 2026 (Chess.com) [02-11] 2026.06.24
C49 Four knights, double Ruy Lopez

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.Nc3 Nc6 4.Bb5 Bb4 5.Bxc6 dxc6 6.d3 Bxc3+ 7.bxc3 Bg4 8.h3 Bxf3 9.Qxf3 Nd7 10.Qg3 O-O 11.O-O f6 12.f4 Qe7 13.a4 c5 14.Rf2 b6 15.Be3 Rae8 16.Raf1 Kh8 17.c4 h6 18.Kh1 Kh7 19.Rf3 Rf7 20.f5 Kh8 21.Qg6 Nf8 22.Qh5 Qd7 23.Rg3 Nh7 24.Rg4 Ref8 25.a5 Qa4 26.axb6 axb6 27.Rf2 Qa1+ 28.Kh2 Qe1 29.Rf3 Qd1 30.Rfg3 Qxc2 31.Bxh6 gxh6 32.Qxf7
